wikiTitle: Hole in the Wall Where the Men Can See it All
text:
The Hole in the Wall Where the Men Can See it All is a character that appeared in the episode "Rixty Minutes".

It is an interdimensional hole in the wall which made an appearance on an alternate dimension's version of Saturday Night Live.
